title: Aurora, 61617, Zog Princess Pearl 12In, Soft Toy, Multicolour
features: Embark on a magical journey with Princess Pearl, the enchanting 12-inch soft toy that brings the wonder of fairy tales to life. Inspired by the book Zog, this cuddly and adorable doll is a fantastical friend ready to ignite the imagination of children.

100% Official Licensed Merchandise: From the award-winning author Julia Donaldson and illustrator Axel Scheffler, the creator of The Gruffalo, this book was first published in 2010. The story of this lovable dragon called Zog and his friend Princess Pearl is loved by millions.

This Princess Pearl Soft Toy is crafted with great care and has a plush exterior that feels soft. It features a cute golden crown on the head, a doctor’s coat with a red dress inside, and a yellow and grey stethoscope. This lovely doll is the soft and snuggly avatar of Princess Pearl, suitable for 1 year and above.

Princess Pearl is a memorable gift for all Julia Donaldson’s stories lovers. Whether it's a birthday surprise, a holiday treat, or a "just because" gesture, Princess Pearl is a magical companion that brings smiles to faces and joy to hearts. This is an amazing gift for anyone who loves the book. Don't miss the chance to bring the magic of the Zog story into your home.

This doll soft toy is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hang tags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming doll soft toy is no exception.
